info.name: HighPerformance API — Full Test Suite
info.description:
Organized test collection for the HighPerformance semester project.

🟢 TIER 1 — MVP (pass the course)
🟡 TIER 2 — MUST (good grade)
🔵 TIER 3 — COULD (very good grade)
⚪ TIER 4 — NICE-TO-HAVE (bonus)

Before running: set the 'baseUrl' collection variable to your server (default: http://localhost:3000).
After login, JWT is saved automatically to 'jwt' variable.

request.description: Verify the server is running.
API discovery — confirms v1 is reachable.
Login — JWT is auto-saved to collection variable 'jwt'.
Verify JWT is valid and user info is returned.
MVP_FR1 — Create basic salesman master data.
MVP_FR1 — Read list of all salesmen.
MVP_FR1 — Read individual salesman.
MVP_FR2 — Create a social performance record. Bonus must be auto-computed.
MVP_FR2 — Read all social performance records for a salesman.
M_FR1 / TR10 — Trigger automatic total bonus computation.
M_FR4 — CEO approves the bonus. Must call /approve/ceo, not /compute.
M_FR3/M_FR4 — HR approves the bonus. Requires CEO approval first (run 2-4). Bonus is then stored in the HR system.
M_FR1 — Retrieve computed total bonus for a salesman. Bonus must already be computed (run 2-1 first).
M_FR2 — Store a short remark on the bonus record.

item.name: 2-6 Sync Salesman Master Data from HR System (M_FR5)

request.description: M_FR5 — Sync salesman master data from the connected HR system. Returns name, employeeId, and department.
Update target/actual values of a social performance record.
TR3 — Verify Swagger UI is reachable at /api-docs.
TR3 — Fetch the OpenAPI spec in YAML.
TR3 — Fetch the OpenAPI spec in JSON.
TR4 — Check reachability of OrangeHRM, OpenCRX, MongoDB, Camunda.
C_FR1 — Create an order evaluation record with individual bonuses.
C_FR1 — Display orders evaluation with per-order bonus.
C_FR4 — Fetch product/client data from OpenCRX with refresh flag.
C_FR2/C_FR3 — Consolidated view: social + orders total bonus for one salesman.
Consolidated view for all salesmen (for dashboard/statistics).
C_FR3 — Store combined total (social + orders) in OrangeHRM.
C_FR6 — Release final bonus so salesman can see it.
C_FR7 — Retrieve stored bonus computation history.
C_FR8 — CEO creates a qualification stored in OrangeHRM.
C_FR9 — Salesman can view their qualifications.
C_FR5 — HR assistant approves (after CEO). Dual approval flow.
HR updates salesman master data.
N_FR4 — Salesman confirms final bonus computation.
N_FR3 — Bonus statistics for all salesmen (used for charts).
N_FR6 / TR5 — Fetch Vaculon LLP employees from Odoo. 503 = Odoo not configured (acceptable).
N_FR2 / TR9 — Start Camunda bonus approval workflow.
N_FR2 / TR9 — List open tasks in a Camunda process instance.
N_FR2 / TR9 — Complete a Camunda user task.
Should return 401 when no JWT is provided.
Should return 404 for unknown employeeId.

item.name: ERR-3 Create Salesman — Missing Required Fields (400)

request.description: Validation — missing employeeId, department, year should return 400.
Should reject invalid credentials.
Creating the same employeeId twice should return 409 Conflict.
